drakkar.title: Build a Drakkar (Small Ships) — the largest small ship type, used for coastal raids and ocean cargo

sea_route.title: Travel a sea route by ship — use Small Ships to move between two coastal locations

subtitle.text: Brigg for cargo. Drakkar for raids. Galley for crew. Four ship types. The sea belongs to whoever builds the fleet.

description: CH.16 · SMALL SHIPS: FLEET
▸ Small Ships adds 4 functional ship types to the game.
The sea was an obstacle before Ch16.
After Ch16 it is a highway.
Elytra covers the sky. Via Romana covers the land.
Small Ships covers the sea.
The kingdom has three transport systems now.
◈ SMALL SHIPS: FOUR TYPES
└ ✦ Rowboat: 2-seat small craft
Light, fast, 1-2 players, minimal cargo
Best for: scouting, short crossings
└ ✦ Brigg: mid-size cargo ship
Large cargo hold, moderate speed
Best for: resource transport, supply runs
└ ✦ Drakkar: Viking-style raid ship
Fast, armed, can hold crew and cargo
Best for: ocean biome exploration, coastal raids
└ ✦ Galley: large crew vessel
Multiple crew seats, can carry Villager Recruits
Best for: troop deployment, amphibious attack
◈ FLEET APPLICATIONS
└ Supply chain: Brigg carrying Shulker Boxes of resources
between coastal base and resource deposit
└ Aquamirae expedition: Drakkar for ocean monument hunting
(Aquamirae adds ocean mobs and structures — ship helps escape)
└ Coastal trade: Via Romana merchant stops on coastline
+ Drakkar for merchant supply via sea route
└ MCA village supply: ferry materials to distant villages by sea
(faster than ground travel for island/coastal villages)
◈ SHIP BUILDING
└ Ship recipes: Small Ships crafting — check JEI for smallships:
└ Materials: wood types affect ship appearance
(Oak, Birch, Spruce, etc. — all functional, cosmetic difference)
└ Ship placement: place in water with item (not placed as block)
└ Mooring: tie ship to post — prevents drift when not piloting
▸ The sea was always there.
Everything the first civilizations built was inland.
They were afraid of the ocean.
They should have been.
You have been through the End.
You are not afraid of the ocean.
Build the fleet.
▶ Build a Drakkar [check]
▶ Travel a sea route by ship [check]
◇ Aquamirae mobs (ocean content mod) make open ocean dangerous.
The Drakkar provides speed to escape and range to fight.
Captain Cornelia (Aquamirae boss) fights at sea.
A ship helps for that encounter.
Celestial Netherite armor + Drakkar = manageable ocean boss.
